resultList.dtldesc: A High-Rise 3 BHK Residence with Open Views in SKA Metro Ville, Eta 2, Greater NoidaPositioned within the modern township of SKA Metro Ville in Eta 2, this beautifully furnished 3 BHK apartment offers an elevated lifestyle defined by comfort, convenience, and expansive views. Located on a higher floor with an open frontage, the property ensures unobstructed surroundings and a sense of privacy that enhances everyday living. Ideal for families and investors alike, this ready-to-move-in residence combines thoughtful design with a strategic location in one of Greater Noidas rapidly developing sectors.Property SpecificationsThis well-appointed apartment spans a super built-up area of 1165 sq. ft and is situated on the 26th floor of a 33-storey tower, offering impressive elevation and excellent ventilation. The layout includes three bedrooms, two bathrooms, and four balconies, creating a bright and airy living environment with multiple outdoor access points. The apartment is fully furnished, allowing immediate occupancy without additional setup. Its east-facing orientation is considered highly favourable, bringing in ample natural light. The inclusion of a puja room and a dedicated store room enhances functionality, catering to both traditional and practical needs. Being a corner unit with an open front view, the residence benefits from enhanced privacy and long-term unobstructed outlook.FacilitiesResidents of SKA Metro Ville enjoy access to a wide range of modern amenities designed for a comfortable lifestyle. These include power backup, reserved parking, servicegoods lifts, visitor parking, intercom facility, and round-the-clock security. The development also features recreational facilities such as a kids play pool with water slides, contributing to a family-friendly environment. Additional conveniences like an RO water system and air-conditioned common areas further enhance the quality of living. The relatively recent construction ensures updated infrastructure and minimal maintenance concerns.LocalityLocated in Eta 2, Greater Noida, the property benefits from strong connectivity and growing infrastructure. The area is well-linked to major road networks and offers easy access to educational institutions, healthcare facilities, shopping centres, and employment hubs. As part of a planned urban zone, Eta 2 continues to attract homebuyers due to its organised layout and future growth potential. The presence of metro connectivity and ongoing development in the region further strengthens its appeal. This apartment, with its premium positioning and comprehensive amenities, presents a compelling opportunity for those seeking a modern home in Greater Noida.
